things.name: Signal Iduna Park (BVB Stadium)
things.description: Borussia Dortmund's iconic stadium with Europe's largest standing terrace, the Yellow Wall

things.name: Dortmund U - Museum Ostwall
things.description: Striking former brewery-turned-cultural centre with contemporary art and rooftop city views

things.name: Westfalenpark
things.description: Vast park with the Florian television tower, rose gardens and the Freddo the Cat roller coaster

things.name: German Football Museum
things.description: State-of-the-art museum celebrating German football history opposite Dortmund's central station

things.name: Hoesch Museum
things.description: Industrial heritage museum documenting Dortmund's steel industry history

things.name: Old Market Square (Alter Markt)
things.description: Historic market square in the old town with traditional taverns and the famous Dortmund beer scene

things.name: Reinoldikirche
things.description: Gothic church dedicated to Dortmund's patron saint with a 104-metre tower dating to 1340

things.name: Zeche Zollern (Mining Museum)
things.description: The Cathedral of Labour — Art Nouveau colliery now a museum of the Ruhr mining heritage

things.name: Max Reger Park & Rombergpark Botanical Garden
things.description: Beautiful botanical garden with over 3,000 plant species including historic arboretum

things.name: Cologne Day Trip
things.description: 75-minute train to Cologne — the magnificent Gothic cathedral, Hohenzollern Bridge and Rhine promenade
